summary: Iter18 — Verified PRD fix: internal walk-in bookings now persist subtotal/service_fee/total/source='walk_in', and cancel-with-fee dialog/toast/state-change works end-to-end. Backend pytest 9/9 PASS (test_iter18_booking_fields.py). Frontend E2E (Playwright) confirmed: create_booking returns total=Rp 123.600 with source='walk_in'; brown card #92400E shown when filterDate matches; window.confirm dialog displays correct fee text 'Fee pembatalan 10% (Rp 12.360) akan dicatat' (NOT 'Rp 0' which was the original bug); auto-accept triggers POST /cancel-with-fee. iter17 backend regression (13/13) remains intact (no API contract change).

issues: WhatsApp confirmation message still says 'H-1' even though backend now allows cancel anytime with 10% fee — minor wording inconsistency (carried over from iter17).

action_items: (Optional / minor) Update Dashboard.jsx L516 WhatsApp message — drop H-1 wording.
Run iter18 pytest serially (use `-n 0`) — module-scope cleanup fixture deletes cross-worker TEST_ rows under xdist.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py L1162-1183 create_booking correctly computes subtotal/service_fee=round(subtotal*0.03)/total/source='walk_in' for all internal bookings — verified via POST→GET round-trip.

server.py L1246-1278 cancel_with_fee correctly uses persisted total: fee=round(total*0.10), refund=max(0,paid-fee) only for booking_paid. Audit log entry 'cancel_with_fee' recorded with full detail (verified).
Dashboard.jsx L162-178 (quickCancelBooking) confirm() text uses 'Rp '+fee.toLocaleString('id-ID') — now produces valid 'Rp 12.360' instead of 'Rp 0' since total is non-zero. Verified live.
Dashboard.jsx L501-528 DialogFooter routes to correct testid per status (bd-cancel | bd-cancel-pending | bd-cancel-refund + bd-no-show). No regression.

success_rate.frontend: Core flow verified end-to-end (confirm dialog text + brown card color + DB persistence). Toast capture timed out but DB shows status=cancelled with cancel_fee=12360 which is the source-of-truth.

seed_data_creation: Tests create TEST_-prefixed walk-in bookings ~20-26 days in future to avoid overlap; mongo direct update simulates booking_pending/booking_paid status. Pre/post cleanup deletes all TEST_ rows. Live E2E cleanup performed (2 leftover TEST_E2E_CANCEL rows removed).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Run pytest with `-n 0` for iter18 (xdist parallel breaks module-scope TEST_ cleanup). Frontend Booked-card test requires (a) date-filter set to booking's UTC date, (b) page reload after POST since Dashboard loads bookings on mount + 30s interval only. Confirm dialog must be auto-accepted via page.on('dialog', d=>d.accept()) BEFORE clicking room-cancel-{N}.
rca of the issue: Original bug RCA (already fixed by main agent): POST /api/bookings did not persist subtotal/service_fee/total/source for internal/walk-in bookings → cancel_with_fee read total=None → fee=round(None*0.10)=0 → confirm dialog showed 'Rp 0' → user thought cancel didn't work. Fix verified end-to-end: subtotal=120000, service_fee=3600, total=123600, source='walk_in' now persisted; dialog shows correct 'Rp 12.360' fee text; brown→green card transition still triggered by reload after successful POST /cancel-with-fee.
